unknownId.query:
#graphql
  query BulkOperationByIdCapture($id: ID!) {
    bulkOperation(id: $id) {
      
  id
  status
  type
  errorCode
  createdAt
  completedAt
  objectCount
  rootObjectCount
  fileSize
  url
  partialDataUrl
  query

    }
  }

errors.message: Variable $id of type ID! was provided invalid value

catalogDefault.query:
#graphql
  query BulkOperationsCatalogCapture(
    $first: Int
    $last: Int
    $after: String
    $before: String
    $query: String
    $sortKey: BulkOperationsSortKeys
    $reverse: Boolean
  ) {
    bulkOperations(
      first: $first
      last: $last
      after: $after
      before: $before
      query: $query
      sortKey: $sortKey
      reverse: $reverse
    ) {
      edges {
        cursor
        node {
          
  id
  status
  type
  errorCode
  createdAt
  completedAt
  objectCount
  rootObjectCount
  fileSize
  url
  partialDataUrl
  query

        }
      }
      nodes {
        
  id
  status
  type
  errorCode
  createdAt
  completedAt
  objectCount
  rootObjectCount
  fileSize
  url
  partialDataUrl
  query

      }
      pageInfo {
        hasNextPage
        hasPreviousPage
        startCursor
        endCursor
      }
    }
  }

errors.message: Field 'bulkOperation' is missing required arguments: id
you must provide one of first or last
providing both first and last is not supported
Field 'bulkOperationCancel' is missing required arguments: id
Field 'bulkOperationRunQuery' is missing required arguments: query

userErrors.message: Bulk queries must contain at least one connection.
